heading: Ascertainment of cost of property and depreciation
label: 824g Ascertainment of cost of property and depreciation

children.heading: Investigation of property costs
children.label: a Investigation of property costs
children.text: The Commission may investigate and ascertain the actual legitimate cost of the property of every public utility, the depreciation therein, and, when found necessary for rate-making purposes, other facts which bear on the determination of such cost or depreciation, and the fair value of such property.

children.heading: Request for inventory and cost statements
children.label: b Request for inventory and cost statements
children.text: Every public utility upon request shall file with the Commission an inventory of all or any part of its property and a statement of the original cost thereof, and shall keep the Commission informed regarding the cost of all additions, betterments, extensions, and new construction.
